nasb.text: that they may fear You, to walk in Your ways as long as they live in the land which You have given to our fathers.

esv.text: that they may fear you and walk in your ways all the days that they live in the land that you gave to our fathers.

cnv.text: 使他們在你賜給我們列祖的地上，一生一世敬畏你，遵行你的道路。

ccb.text: 使你的子民在你赐给我们祖先的土地上终生敬畏你，遵行你的道。
